---
title: "test_annex_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_annex_empire.py"
loc: 8
complexity: 1
logic_score: 7.52
style_score: 8.14
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 4.75
---

## Intent
The `test_annex_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_annex_scan. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_annex_scan. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 8.1/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.core.annex](file://src.core.annex)

### Exports
- `test_annex_scan`
